title: The Chase Begins
description: Back in the present, Aqua Laguna bears down on Water Seven while CP9 prepares to leave with Robin and Franky.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Franky, Luffy, Nami, Zoro, Sanji. Back in the present, Aqua Laguna bears down on Water Seven while CP9 prepares to leave with Robin and Franky.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: leave this matter in your hands, spandam.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: I've worked hard for this chance!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: I won't let it go this easy!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky Family
dialogue.text: I wanna give you something important.

dialogue.speaker: CP9 agent
dialogue.text: But alright, I'll take care of it!!

dialogue.speaker: CP9 agent
dialogue.text: Stupid idiot!!! Think before you speak!!

dialogue.speaker: CP9 agent
dialogue.text: I'm gonna take care of it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yeah. The world will be destroyed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But, do whatever you damn well please!!

summary: Back in the present, Aqua Laguna bears down on Water Seven while CP9 prepares to leave with Robin and Franky.
